primary_objectives: Strategic penetration of the Canadian SMB and Enterprise market.
Full digitalisation and automation for Algerian and Canadian SMBs.
Maximising long-term growth and yield in Wealthsimple/USD (Tax-efficient for Canada).
Building a custom Zig-based network stack (Aura Edge) to replace Cloudflare, Next.js, and standard cryptography.
Freedom of time: minimising reactive work, maximising deep work for Canadian founders.
